title: StudioDash App Store Analytics
seoTitle: StudioDash App Store Analytics | BarkinMad Studios
description: Monitor app performance, downloads, sales, ratings, reviews, and release status from App Store Connect in one place with StudioDash.
summary: StudioDash brings together App Store Connect insights, helping developers understand app performance, product status, downloads, revenue, and customer feedback from a single dashboard.

featureShowcases.heading: Understand Your App Portfolio
featureShowcases.summary: Monitor the status and performance of every app in one place.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash brings together key App Store Connect information, helping you understand where every app is in its lifecycle while keeping downloads, revenue, ratings, reviews, and release status within easy reach. Instead of switching between multiple screens, you can review the health of your portfolio from a single workspace.
bullets: View app lifecycle and release status at a glance.
Monitor downloads, ratings, reviews, and revenue together.
Keep portfolio management simple with one consistent view.

image.alt: StudioDash App Store analytics view showing app portfolio status and provider performance
image.caption: See the status and performance of every app in one place.

sections.heading: App Store Connect Integration
paragraphs: StudioDash integrates with App Store Connect to bring together the information developers use every day, including app status, downloads, sales, ratings, reviews, and other available analytics.
Available information depends on your connected account, API permissions, and the services supported by App Store Connect.

sections.heading: Portfolio Overview
paragraphs: Managing multiple apps becomes much easier when every product can be viewed together. StudioDash presents your apps in a portfolio view, making it simple to compare release status, downloads, revenue, ratings, reviews, and other key metrics.
Each app card highlights the information that matters most, helping you identify changes and monitor the overall health of your portfolio.

sections.heading: Clear and Accurate Status Information
paragraphs: StudioDash uses clear status labels to accurately represent the information available from each provider. Features that are still being developed or are not yet available are clearly identified, helping you understand exactly what data is available.
This approach keeps dashboards transparent while avoiding confusion between live, planned, and in-development functionality.
